text.title: gcp-iam-design Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for gcp-iam-design as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Granting roles/editor to a team group at the project level "for convenience".
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Editor grants write access to all GCP services in the project. When the team's scope changes or a member leaves, the blast radius of the over-permission is already established. Use predefined per-service roles (roles/cloudsql.client, roles/storage.objectAdmin) and update them as scope changes.
